textByHash.13d896bbd21c604bf2f1cd30cc83ed06c125ed9d: My name Ak-Haranu. I am trader, come from many far across sea in east.
textByHash.bb61c5c43e74addc9c6311dec503a0a76b7b57cd: Ak-Haranu may help you. A translation manual I have, much good for reading Eastern language.
textByHash.417aeaa7feb988418c8f9ad4790f8aa84717b4d8: Ak-Haranu not want money for this book, as is such small thing. But there may be something you could do for me. I am big admirer of Robin, Master Bowman. He staying in village inn.
textByHash.44f446a292852f0486467eb6ac33f458b2d65911: Please get Master Bowman sign an oak longbow for me, so Ak-Haranu can show family and friends when returning home and become much admired. Then I give you book in exchange.
textByHash.085285f8f24a7d2d54ce129541028f4211d567d5: No, Ak-Haranu afraid that no longbow in supply at moment. You must make one or buy one.
textByHash.d9caba730b8b753f0d4d0fd9d8fdfee1f644cca0: How Master getting on with longbow?
textByHash.f3f4e1e073ef11f9fc49d1fde825653459fc3819: Ah, can it be true? You have obtained bow from Master Bowman?
textByHash.d010f50210d927267cbf9e940f9598bd0f698410: May honour be bestowed upon you and your family!
textByHash.b41bc2f4b22c732ff478c326f9d2a25f4014872b: Ah, no worry, my friend. For the gift of longbow Ak-Haranu would give a thousand books.
textByHash.570e7884489ccc4f40e7cf2e8dc6449d06131de3: And Ak-Haranu thanks you for kind gift of longbow.
